subject: Create OpenDaylight Titanium docker container
commit_message:
Create OpenDaylight Titanium docker container

Create OpenDaylight Potassium docker container and remove docker containers no longer needed

Issue-ID: CCSDK-4195
Signed-off-by: Dan Timoney <dtimoney@att.com>
Change-Id: I1fa4f2e732aeb259d812693bb3a442e40867a7ce
